candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, not the total; less appropriate than the exact total line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash; useful cross-check but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-period cash, not the balance-sheet stock at year-end.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Adjustment item, not cash balance.
Non-cash reconciliation item, unrelated.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Current liability component, not the total.

Cash flow change line, not the balance-sheet level.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current interest-bearing liabilities; excludes lease liabilities because leases are shown separately.
Interest-bearing debt but non-current, so not STD.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current debt-like maturity but explicitly lease-related, which baseline STD excludes.
Explicitly lease liabilities, excluded from STD baseline.
Lease-related and includes non-current portions; excluded.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist. It is the clean reported current financing debt line and lease liabilities are separately disclosed, so excluding leases is straightforward.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable line on the balance sheet.
Tax asset, opposite of taxes payable.
Cash flow item, not taxes payable liability.
Deferred taxes, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist; it is an exact current taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net total property, plant and equipment; preferred over gross/components and lease right-of-use items.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible asset related but lease ROU gross asset, not preferred total PPE.
Intangible, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Net - Total
candidates.why: Intangible assets, not PPE.
Cash flow for intangibles, not balance-sheet PPE.
